title: CVE-2026-3714 - OpenCart Incomplete Fix CVE-2024-36694 template.php save special

rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 — CVE-2026-3714 - OpenCart Incomplete Fix CVE-2024-36694 templ
status: experimental
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX
date: 2026/03/09
logsource:
    category: firewall
detection:
    selection_ip:
        dst_ip:
            - '4.0.2.3'
    selection_dns:
        query:
            - '*template.php*'
    condition: selection_ip or selection_dns
level: high
suricata: alert ip any any -> 4.0.2.3 any (msg:"CDB APEX — CVE_2026_3714___OpenCart_Incom"; sid:2511855; rev:1;)
snort: alert ip any any -> 4.0.2.3 any (msg:"CDB APEX CVE_2026_3714___OpenCart_Incom"; sid:1491709; rev:1;)
